vehicle.label: Tiltrotor VTOL Hybrid
vehicle.desc: Fixed-wing VTOL with 2 tilting rotor nacelles, BVLOS long-range capable

parts.label: Center Fuselage Spine
parts.spec: CFRP box beam center fuselage, avionics bay, wing spar socket, front GPS boom mount, belly camera window

parts.label: Main Wing (2-piece)
parts.spec: Straight wing, 4S NACA 2412, dual 15mm CFRP spar, 900mm half-span, 160mm chord, 3-layer CFRP skin

parts.label: Nacelle Assembly x 2
parts.spec: Tilting nacelle assembly, 0-90deg tilt axis, 6309 bearing set, servo-driven worm gear, motor and ESC pocket

parts.label: Tilt Servo + Linkage x 2
parts.spec: 25kg-cm DS3218 servo per nacelle, titanium pushrod, dual ball joints, tilt range 0-93deg, crash-tolerant

parts.label: V-Tail x 2 (Ruddervator)
parts.spec: +-35deg V-tail ruddervator pair, MG996R servo each, 30deg dihedral, CFRP sandwich panel, hinge piano wire

parts.label: Landing Gear (Tri)
parts.spec: Tricycle landing gear, spring-steel skid arms, 55mm dia wheels, CG at 1/3 chord, 200mm wheelbase

parts.label: Battery Bay (Slide-In)
parts.spec: Belly slide-in battery bay, 6S 8000mAh Li-ion pack, Velcro + strap dual retention, CG position 28% MAC

parts.label: Payload Nose Bay
parts.spec: Interchangeable nose payload bay, Day/IR camera gimbal or survey sensor, 80x60x50mm, 300g payload limit

parts.label: Tilt-Axis Harness + Datum Service Bay
parts.spec: Tiltrotor integration_service module with tilt-axis harness_channel, slack_loop, interface_datum, service_hatch, connector keying, and nacelle-to-wing load-path inspection access

requirements: Tilting nacelle assembly, 0-90deg tilt axis, 6309 bearing set, servo-driven worm gear, motor and ESC pocket

risk.desc: Potential thermal stress on avionics bay due to high heat generation
risk.mit: Implement active cooling system

risk.desc: Risk of structural failure under extreme load conditions
risk.mit: Conduct additional load testing and reinforce critical areas

risk.desc: Insufficient clearance for moving parts may cause jamming
risk.mit: Increase clearance between moving parts

risk.desc: Potential for water ingress through camera window
risk.mit: Add waterproof sealing around camera window

risk.desc: Risk of improper alignment during assembly
risk.mit: Include detailed assembly instructions and alignment aids

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: CFRP box beam center fuselage, avionics bay, wing spar socket, front GPS boom mount, belly camera window

physics_paths.description: Transfers nacelle loads into fuselage spine
Loads from wing spar into fuselage spine
Heat dissipation from avionics bay to fuselage shell

generated_parts.label: Main Wing (2-piece)
generated_parts.spec: Straight wing, 4S NACA 2412, dual 15mm CFRP spar, 900mm half-span, 160mm chord, 3-layer CFRP skin

requirements: Straight wing, 4S NACA 2412, dual 15mm CFRP spar, 900mm half-span, 160mm chord, 3-layer CFRP skin
Fixed-wing VTOL with 2 tilting rotor nacelles, BVLOS long-range capable
Wing spar carrying nacelle loads into fuselage spine; V-tail/ruddervator and landing gear attach structure

risk.desc: Potential overestimation of mass due to material density assumptions.
risk.mit: Review material density values and adjust mass estimation accordingly.

risk.desc: Insufficient documentation on thermal management strategies for the wing skin.
risk.mit: Include detailed thermal management plans and simulations in the design documentation.

risk.desc: Risk of misalignment during assembly due to lack of precise alignment features.
risk.mit: Add alignment pins or guide features to ensure proper assembly.

risk.desc: Uncertainty in the exact load distribution from the nacelle to the wing spar.
risk.mit: Conduct finite element analysis to accurately model load distribution.

risk.desc: Risk of inadequate service access due to limited cutout size.
risk.mit: Increase the size of the service access cutout to ensure easier maintenance.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Wing spar carrying nacelle loads into fuselage spine; V-tail/ruddervator and landing gear attach structure

physics_paths.description: Loads from nacelle tilt mechanism transferred through bearing seats into wing spar.
Payload and battery service access through fuselage spine and wing spar socket.
Heat dissipation from sun exposure through wing skin.

internal_feature_targets.description: Dual 15mm CFRP spars running along the length of the wing.
Fuselage spine attachment point with a 100x100mm base.
Mounting point for V-tail with a 50x50mm base.
Mounting point for landing gear with a 60x60mm base.
Pocket for avionics sensors with a 40x40mm base.
Cutout for service access with a 100x100mm opening.
Interface for harness connections with a 30x30mm base.

integration_opportunities.description: Cutout provides access for maintenance and servicing.
Interface for transferring data between avionics and other systems.
Spars transfer loads from nacelle to fuselage spine.

verification_focus.description: Verify the mass of the main wing does not exceed 2500g.
Ensure all critical interfaces have a clearance of at least 0.2mm.
Validate load transfer capacity of wing spars under specified conditions.
